description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian, depicted with a naturalistic human form and proportions. The figure appears to be wearing fitted clothing, with a clear distinction between the upper and lower body garments. The posture is upright, suggesting the person is either standing or walking, with arms positioned close to the sides. The surface is smooth and lacks fine detail, indicating a stylized or simplified representation. No accessories or carried items are visible, and the head is proportionate to the body, with no distinct facial features discernible.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian figure in fitted clothing, standing upright with a smooth, simplified surface and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: The lower portion of the figure is visible, showing the legs and part of the torso with a smooth, dark surface.
description_view_1: A similar lower body view, with the legs and a portion of the torso visible, highlighting the smooth, dark material.
description_view_2: A top-down perspective reveals the head and shoulders, emphasizing the rectangular shape and smooth finish.
description_view_3: A side view of the lower body and torso, again showing the smooth, dark surface and fitted clothing.
